portability_tests.description: A deterministic verified shutdown escape bundle remains inspectable without a model, network, preferred UI, cloud credential, running doll service, or import of the doll package.

limitations: CI proves deterministic construction, validation, failure cleanup, and doll-independent inspection with synthetic non-private state.
PORT-015 passes at both ci and real-machine evidence levels through privacy-reviewed exact-commit primary Intel Mac evidence.
The State Package is the complete implemented machine-restorable surface; generic conversation and Resume Bundle members are inspectable recovery views.
Secret records, credentials, model assets, runtime assets, caches, and temporary files are omitted.
No target-specific application import, native Ollama history discovery, ChatGPT history migration, or provider-specific round trip is claimed.
The complete Phase 6 gate and a stable general anti-lock-in claim remain pending.
